name: Lanterns Over Aoshima
description: Romance. A summer lantern festival on the seaside town of Aoshima. Rin has one evening to find the words she's been saving for Haru. A gentle, non-combat experience about nerve, timing, and honesty. Original content.
author: Genesis Infinity

items.name: Takoyaki
items.description: A paper tray of hot octopus dumplings from a food stall — comfort food that settles the stomach and the nerves.

items.name: Paper Charm
items.description: A little omamori bought at the shrine stall. Holding it makes the next brave thing feel a bit less impossible.
